title: digitaria adscendens var. fimbriata
intro: Digitaria adscendens var. fimbriata, also known as finger grass or finger grass var. fimbriata, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Digitaria adscendens var. fimbriata include its potential to help manage diabetes, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of fever and respiratory infections. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea or tincture, or used as a topical application in the form of a poultice or ointment.
